title: hydrangea hwangii
intro: Hydrangea hwangii, also known as Hwanggi, is a type of plant native to the mountainous regions of Korea, often referred to as a medicinal herb. It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in traditional medicine. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and even help regulate blood pressure. In traditional Korean medicine, Hwanggi is often prepared as a tea or decoction, with herbalists using the roots and leaves to create remedies for various ailments.
